testcase.name: handleRefund_shouldRejectIfNotCompleted

o.hibernate.jpa.internal.util.LogHelper : HHH000204: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: default] 2026-04-16T22:44:58.764+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] org.hibernate.Version : HHH000412: Hibernate ORM core version 6.4.4.Final 2026-04-16T22:44:58.828+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] o.h.c.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator : HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled 2026-04-16T22:44:59.255+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] o.s.o.j.p.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo : No LoadTimeWeaver setup: ignoring JPA class transformer 2026-04-16T22:44:59.343+01:00 WARN 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-04-16T22:45:00.520+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists payments cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists saga_states cascade Hibernate: create table payments ( amount numeric(10,2) not null, currency varchar(3) not null, course_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6) not null, enrollment_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, paid_date timestamp(6), refunded_date timestamp(6), student_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, status varchar(20) not null check (status in ('PENDING','COMPLETED','FAILED','REFUNDED')), idempotency_key varchar(100) unique, stripe_payment_id varchar(100) unique, failure_reason varchar(500), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table saga_states ( course_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6) not null, enrollment_id bigint not null unique, id bigint generated by default as identity, payment_id bigint, student_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, state varchar(30) not null check (state in ('INITIATED','PAYMENT_PENDING','PAYMENT_COMPLETED','PAYMENT_FAILED','REFUNDED')), correlation_id varchar(100), last_event_id varchar(100), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create index idx_payments_enrollment_id on payments (enrollment_id) Hibernate: create index idx_payments_stripe_payment_id on payments (stripe_payment_id) Hibernate: create index idx_payments_status on payments (status) Hibernate: create index idx_saga_correlation_id on saga_states (correlation_id) 2026-04-16T22:45:00.582+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-04-16T22:45:01.129+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.EnrollmentPaymentSagaTest : Started EnrollmentPaymentSagaTest in 4.931 seconds (process running for 6.653) 2026-04-16T22:45:01.718+01:00 WARN 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] testcase.name: handleStudentEnrolled_shouldHandleNullPrice
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T22:45:02.249+01:00 WARN 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.p.m.ServiceBusEventPublisher : Azure Service Bus connection string not configured. Events will be logged but not published. 2026-04-16T22:45:02.249+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.saga.EnrollmentPaymentSaga : Saga: Handling StudentEnrolledEvent for enrollment 7 Hibernate: select ss1_0.id, ss1_0.correlation_id, ss1_0.course_id, ss1_0.created_at, ss1_0.enrollment_id, ss1_0.last_event_id, ss1_0.payment_id, ss1_0.state, ss1_0.student_id, ss1_0.updated_at from saga_states ss1_0 where ss1_0.enrollment_id=? 2026-04-16T22:45:02.253+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.saga.EnrollmentPaymentSaga : Saga: Zero-price enrollment 7, auto-completing Hibernate: insert into saga_states (correlation_id, course_id, created_at, enrollment_id, last_event_id, payment_id, state, student_id, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-04-16T22:45:02.258+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.p.m.ServiceBusEventPublisher : [LOCAL] Would publish to topic 'payment-completed': {"eventType":"PaymentCompleted","eventId":"6e41e116-14d6-4af1-aa92-5c65edde345a","occurredAt":1776375902.254569900,"correlationId":null,"source":"payment-service","version":1,"paymentId":null,"enrollmentId":7,"amount":0,"currency":"USD","stripePaymentId":null,"eventType":"PaymentCompleted"} Hibernate: select ss1_0.id, ss1_0.correlation_id, ss1_0.course_id, ss1_0.created_at, ss1_0.enrollment_id, ss1_0.last_event_id, ss1_0.payment_id, ss1_0.state, ss1_0.student_id, ss1_0.updated_at from saga_states ss1_0 where ss1_0.enrollment_id=?

testcase.name: handleStudentEnrolled_shouldBeIdempotent
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T22:45:02.267+01:00 WARN 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.p.m.ServiceBusEventPublisher : Azure Service Bus connection string not configured. Events will be logged but not published. 2026-04-16T22:45:02.268+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.saga.EnrollmentPaymentSaga : Saga: Handling StudentEnrolledEvent for enrollment 4 Hibernate: select ss1_0.id, ss1_0.correlation_id, ss1_0.course_id, ss1_0.created_at, ss1_0.enrollment_id, ss1_0.last_event_id, ss1_0.payment_id, ss1_0.state, ss1_0.student_id, ss1_0.updated_at from saga_states ss1_0 where ss1_0.enrollment_id=? Hibernate: insert into saga_states (correlation_id, course_id, created_at, enrollment_id, last_event_id, payment_id, state, student_id, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select p1_0.id, p1_0.amount, p1_0.course_id, p1_0.created_at, p1_0.currency, p1_0.enrollment_id, p1_0.failure_reason, p1_0.idempotency_key, p1_0.paid_date, p1_0.refunded_date, p1_0.status, p1_0.stripe_payment_id, p1_0.student_id, p1_0.updated_at from payments p1_0 where p1_0.idempotency_key=? Hibernate: insert into payments (amount, course_id, created_at, currency, enrollment_id, failure_reason, idempotency_key, paid_date, refunded_date, status, stripe_payment_id, student_id, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-04-16T22:45:02.278+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.service.PaymentService : Payment 4 created for enrollment 4 2026-04-16T22:45:02.278+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.saga.EnrollmentPaymentSaga : Saga 6: INITIATED → PAYMENT_PENDING 2026-04-16T22:45:02.279+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.gateway.MockStripeGateway : Mock Stripe: Creating payment intent for 50.00 USD, idempotencyKey=enrollment_4 2026-04-16T22:45:02.279+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.gateway.MockStripeGateway : Mock Stripe: Payment intent created: pi_mock_b7ee98cd85394527bad3414f 2026-04-16T22:45:02.279+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.saga.EnrollmentPaymentSaga : Saga 6: PAYMENT_PENDING → PAYMENT_COMPLETED Hibernate: update saga_states set correlation_id=?, course_id=?, enrollment_id=?, last_event_id=?, payment_id=?, state=?, student_id=?, updated_at=? where id=? Hibernate: update payments set amount=?, course_id=?, currency=?, enrollment_id=?, failure_reason=?, idempotency_key=?, paid_date=?, refunded_date=?, status=?, stripe_payment_id=?, student_id=?, updated_at=? where id=? Hibernate: select ss1_0.id, ss1_0.correlation_id, ss1_0.course_id, ss1_0.created_at, ss1_0.enrollment_id, ss1_0.last_event_id, ss1_0.payment_id, ss1_0.state, ss1_0.student_id, ss1_0.updated_at from saga_states ss1_0 where ss1_0.enrollment_id=? 2026-04-16T22:45:02.288+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.p.m.ServiceBusEventPublisher : [LOCAL] Would publish to topic 'payment-completed': {"eventType":"PaymentCompleted","eventId":"2c0e3a6d-5efb-4b61-8e61-290e915ccc67","occurredAt":1776375902.279577900,"correlationId":null,"source":"payment-service","version":1,"paymentId":4,"enrollmentId":4,"amount":50.00,"currency":"USD","stripePaymentId":"pi_mock_b7ee98cd85394527bad3414f","eventType":"PaymentCompleted"} 2026-04-16T22:45:02.289+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.saga.EnrollmentPaymentSaga : Saga: Handling StudentEnrolledEvent for enrollment 4 Hibernate: select ss1_0.id, ss1_0.correlation_id, ss1_0.course_id, ss1_0.created_at, ss1_0.enrollment_id, ss1_0.last_event_id, ss1_0.payment_id, ss1_0.state, ss1_0.student_id, ss1_0.updated_at from saga_states ss1_0 where ss1_0.enrollment_id=? 2026-04-16T22:45:02.292+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.saga.EnrollmentPaymentSaga : Saga already exists for enrollment 4 in state PAYMENT_COMPLETED, skipping Hibernate: select ss1_0.id, ss1_0.correlation_id, ss1_0.course_id, ss1_0.created_at, ss1_0.enrollment_id, ss1_0.last_event_id, ss1_0.payment_id, ss1_0.state, ss1_0.student_id, ss1_0.updated_at from saga_states ss1_0 where ss1_0.enrollment_id=?

testcase.name: handleStudentEnrolled_shouldCompleteSagaForValidPayment
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T22:45:02.301+01:00 WARN 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.p.m.ServiceBusEventPublisher : Azure Service Bus connection string not configured. Events will be logged but not published. 2026-04-16T22:45:02.302+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.saga.EnrollmentPaymentSaga : Saga: Handling StudentEnrolledEvent for enrollment 1 Hibernate: select ss1_0.id, ss1_0.correlation_id, ss1_0.course_id, ss1_0.created_at, ss1_0.enrollment_id, ss1_0.last_event_id, ss1_0.payment_id, ss1_0.state, ss1_0.student_id, ss1_0.updated_at from saga_states ss1_0 where ss1_0.enrollment_id=? Hibernate: insert into saga_states (correlation_id, course_id, created_at, enrollment_id, last_event_id, payment_id, state, student_id, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select p1_0.id, p1_0.amount, p1_0.course_id, p1_0.created_at, p1_0.currency, p1_0.enrollment_id, p1_0.failure_reason, p1_0.idempotency_key, p1_0.paid_date, p1_0.refunded_date, p1_0.status, p1_0.stripe_payment_id, p1_0.student_id, p1_0.updated_at from payments p1_0 where p1_0.idempotency_key=? Hibernate: insert into payments (amount, course_id, created_at, currency, enrollment_id, failure_reason, idempotency_key, paid_date, refunded_date, status, stripe_payment_id, student_id, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-04-16T22:45:02.311+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.service.PaymentService : Payment 5 created for enrollment 1 2026-04-16T22:45:02.312+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.saga.EnrollmentPaymentSaga : Saga 7: INITIATED → PAYMENT_PENDING 2026-04-16T22:45:02.312+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.gateway.MockStripeGateway : Mock Stripe: Creating payment intent for 50.00 USD, idempotencyKey=enrollment_1 2026-04-16T22:45:02.312+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.gateway.MockStripeGateway : Mock Stripe: Payment intent created: pi_mock_b2ab9dbadbdc4912b23d512a 2026-04-16T22:45:02.313+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.payment.saga.EnrollmentPaymentSaga : Saga 7: PAYMENT_PENDING → PAYMENT_COMPLETED Hibernate: update saga_states set correlation_id=?, course_id=?, enrollment_id=?, last_event_id=?, payment_id=?, state=?, student_id=?, updated_at=? where id=? Hibernate: update payments set amount=?, course_id=?, currency=?, enrollment_id=?, failure_reason=?, idempotency_key=?, paid_date=?, refunded_date=?, status=?, stripe_payment_id=?, student_id=?, updated_at=? where id=? Hibernate: select ss1_0.id, ss1_0.correlation_id, ss1_0.course_id, ss1_0.created_at, ss1_0.enrollment_id, ss1_0.last_event_id, ss1_0.payment_id, ss1_0.state, ss1_0.student_id, ss1_0.updated_at from saga_states ss1_0 where ss1_0.enrollment_id=? 2026-04-16T22:45:02.319+01:00 INFO 39404 --- [payment-service] [ main] c.e.p.m.ServiceBusEventPublisher : [LOCAL] Would publish to topic 'payment-completed': {"eventType":"PaymentCompleted","eventId":"6cef295c-fd90-456a-a837-3e1b18e6242a","occurredAt":1776375902.313356400,"correlationId":"corr-123","source":"payment-service","version":1,"paymentId":5,"enrollmentId":1,"amount":50.00,"currency":"USD","stripePaymentId":"pi_mock_b2ab9dbadbdc4912b23d512a","eventType":"PaymentCompleted"} Hibernate: select ss1_0.id, ss1_0.correlation_id, ss1_0.course_id, ss1_0.created_at, ss1_0.enrollment_id, ss1_0.last_event_id, ss1_0.payment_id, ss1_0.state, ss1_0.student_id, ss1_0.updated_at from saga_states ss1_0 where ss1_0.enrollment_id=?
